title: Apple ignores DMA interoperability requests and contradicts own documentation
content: Apple has declined to implement Direct Memory Access (DMA) interoperability features requested by some developers, despite stating in its documentation that such compatibility would be supported. This decision contradicts the stated capabilities, leading to confusion over hardware compatibility and impacting developers who rely on DMA for performance and low‑level memory access. The company’s stance creates inconsistencies between its public documents and actual product behavior.
eventKey: apple-ignores-dma-interoperability-requests-contradicts
normalizedTitle: apple ignores dma interoperability requests and contradicts own documentation

title: Marc Andreessen: Monitoring the Situation and the Future of Media
content: Marc Andreessen, cofounder of a16z, explains the launch of Monitoring the Situation (MTS), an always‑on media network on X. The interview with Erik Torenberg and Theo Jaffee covers how real‑time news spreads, the rise of “current thing” narratives, and the impact of internet‑native media on politics, culture, and attention. Links to the speakers and MTS are provided for further updates. The discussion is informational only and is not investment advice.

title: 英格兰学校将禁止使用智能手机
content: England will prohibit students from using smartphones in schools, a policy announced by education authorities. The ban aims to reduce distractions and improve learning focus across schools nationwide. Schools will enforce the restriction through various monitoring measures. The decision follows concerns over digital device misuse, social media influence, and classroom disruption. The policy will be rolled out over the upcoming academic year.

title: 谷歌也急了
content: Google has formed a “strike team” to boost its AI coding power after its internal memo urged rapid shift toward agent technology to catch up with Anthropic, which now produces nearly all its code through AI. The team will train models on Google’s proprietary codebase, aiming to evolve AI into self‑improving developers. Founder Sergey Brin is personally demanding that DeepMind staff use internal agents for complex tasks, signalling a strategic pivot from external offerings to internal, high‑impact coding capabilities.

title: 华为发布首款鸿蒙 AI 眼镜
content: Huawei unveiled its first HarmonyOS AI glasses, featuring a 12‑megapixel ultra‑sensitive camera, AI‑assisted composition correction, 0.7‑second AI flash capture, and an integrated Xiaoyi AI assistant for real‑time video interaction. The glasses also support “look‑and‑pay” via Alipay.

title: 爱奇艺「AI 艺人库」计划引发争议 多位艺人否认授权
content: At the 2026 World Conference, iQiyi launched its “AI Artist Library” project, claiming over 100 artists had joined to create digital avatars for performances. However, several artists quickly denied having signed any authorization agreement, sparking public debate over the legality and artist‑rights implications of AI use in entertainment.

title: Anthropic与亚马逊达成1000亿美元人工智能基础设施合作协议
content: Anthropic and Amazon have entered a $100 billion agreement to support Anthropic’s artificial‑intelligence infrastructure. The deal will provide Amazon Web Services with the resources needed to deploy Anthropic’s cloud‑based AI models, assisting the company in scaling its technology while ensuring robust security and compliance standards. This partnership aims to accelerate the development and deployment of advanced AI solutions for a range of commercial applications.
